creator: nick@van-laarhoven.org
text:
===>  Found saved configuration for win32-codecs-3.1.0.r1,1
=> win32/qtextras-20041107.tar.bz2 is not in /usr/ports/multimedia/win32-codecs/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/multimedia/win32-codecs/distinfo is out of date, or
=> win32/qtextras-20041107.tar.bz2 is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Fix: 

cd /usr/ports/multimedia/win32-codecs
sed -i '' -e '/^FORBIDDEN/d' Makefile
make makesum
cvs ci -m 'Add checksums for the QuickTime specific files'
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/multimedia/win32-codecs
sed -i '' -e '/^FORBIDDEN/d' Makefile
make extract -DWITH_QUICKTIME
